CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, text_string VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'hello world'), (2, 'abc def gh'), (3, 'xyz bcd'), (4, 'no match here');
SELECT position('b' IN text_string) FROM test_strings;
SELECT position('abc' IN text_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT position('z' IN text_string) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT position(' ' IN text_string) FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, text_string, position('o' IN text_string) AS pos FROM test_strings WHERE pos > 0;
SELECT id, text_string FROM test_strings WHERE position('no' IN text_string) = 0;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT text_string, position('c' IN text_string) AS pos FROM test_strings) AS subquery WHERE pos > 0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, search_string VARCHAR);
SELECT a.id, position(a.search_string IN t.text_string) FROM another_table a JOIN test_strings t ON position(a.search_string IN t.text_string) > 0;
SELECT MAX(position('f' IN text_string)) FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, text_string, position('g' IN text_string) + position('h' IN text_string) FROM test_strings;
SELECT position('b' IN CONCAT(text_string, ' b')) AS position_result FROM test_strings;
